nodes.label: Return True if the URL is a blank new-chat (no conversation ID).      Fresh chat
Guarantee we are on a brand-new Gemini chat before proceeding.      Steps     --
Send Ctrl+Shift+O to the page, with a JS fallback.
Collect all candidate generated-image URLs from the current tab.
Wait until a new image appears in the page that wasn't there before sending.
Save the generated image to out_path_no_ext + inferred extension.      Strategy
